heading: Grants to States
label: 5423 Grants to States
notes: Amendments1980—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “manufactured home” for “mobile home”.Pub. L. 96–399
Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of 180 days following , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 22, 1974section 627 of Pub. L. 93–383section 5401 of this title
amendments: Amendments1980—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “manufactured home” for “mobile home”.Pub. L. 96–399

children.text: in identifying their needs and responsibilities in the area of manufactured home construction and safety standards; or
in developing State plans under .section 5422 of this title

children.heading: Designation by Governor of State agency for receipt of grant
children.label: b Designation by Governor of State agency for receipt of grant
children.text: The Governor of each State shall designate the appropriate State agency for receipt of any grant made by the Secretary under this section.

children.heading: Submission of application by State agency to Secretary; review by Secretary
children.label: c Submission of application by State agency to Secretary; review by Secretary
children.text: Any State agency designated by the Governor of a State desiring a grant under this section shall submit an application therefor to the Secretary. The Secretary shall review and either accept or reject such application.

children.heading: Amount of Federal share; equality of distribution of funds
children.label: d Amount of Federal share; equality of distribution of funds
children.text: The Federal share for each State grant under subsection (a) of this section may not exceed 90 per centum of the total cost to the State in identifying its needs and developing its plan. In the event the Federal share for all States under such subsection is not the same, the differences among the States shall be established on the basis of objective criteria.
